title: centella tridentata var. dregeana
intro: Centella tridentata var. dregeana, also known as the Drege's centella, is a variety of the Centella tridentata plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions, wounds, and burns.
